criteria.text: Row-label orientation: metric names in column A, days as columns; sum day cells per metric into canonical keys producing the existing DTO
Orientation auto-detect: both column-A row-label layout and row-0 header layout parse correctly (real files + MAD-27 header model)
Stacked weekly blocks aggregated: a metric recurring across stacked weekly blocks is summed into the month total, none missed
Skip subtotal/structural rows + Totals column: TOTAL rows, day-header rows, blanks, and the Totals column excluded (no double-count)
Latest-tab-with-data selection: latest non-empty metric tab is current, previous non-empty is prior; empty trailing tabs skipped; no date math
DTO unchanged + fixtures re-pinned to real (row-label, stacked-block) orientation
Graceful degradation: unreadable/blank/odd tab degrades to empty/0, endpoint never throws
HIPAA audit + PHI-safe logging intact: workbook-read audit (item refs, no cell values) and unmapped-column log (sheet+column refs, never cell values) remain in force
